creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text: The original report (not for 13.3, but for main) is bug 274698 and received a fix, then backported to stable/14.  The fixes done for bug 275594 for stable/13 and then releng/13.3 (bug 278375) are essentially backports of it. For a full chronology of commits for this fix, see bug 274698, comment 10.
